positive: A sophisticated, detailed illustration of a celestial map showing constellations connected by glowing lines. Features include a crescent moon, stylized zodiac symbols, and a small, elegant mythical creature (like a griffin) resting on a nebula. Deep indigo and gold palette, engraved etching style, highly decorative.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, childish, messy lines
